title: lepisanthes simplicifolia
intro: Lepisanthes simplicifolia, also known as the Philippine hawthorn, is a species of plant in the family Salicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisanthes simplicifolia include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating gastrointestinal issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
